name: Cisco Intersight TA Tools
description: MCP tools for managing and querying the Cisco Intersight Add-on for Splunk
author: cisco-intersight-setup skill

tools.name: cisco_intersight_check_health
tools.title: Cisco Intersight Health Check
tools.description: Check the health status of Cisco Intersight TA data collection. Shows event counts, active inputs, and last event timestamps.
tools.spl: | rest /services/data/inputs/all count=0 | search eai:acl.app="Splunk_TA_Cisco_Intersight" disabled=0 | stats count as enabled_inputs | appendcols [| tstats count as total_events where index=intersight] | appendcols [| tstats latest(_time) as last_event where index=intersight | eval last_event=strftime(last_event, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")]
examples: How many events are being collected?

tools.name: cisco_intersight_list_inputs
tools.title: Cisco Intersight List Inputs
tools.description: List all configured data inputs for the Cisco Intersight TA with their status.
tools.spl: | rest /services/data/inputs/all count=0 | search eai:acl.app="Splunk_TA_Cisco_Intersight" | table title, eai:acl.app, disabled, index | sort title

tools.name: cisco_intersight_alarms
tools.title: Intersight Active Alarms
tools.description: Show active alarms from Cisco Intersight with severity and affected objects.
tools.spl: index=intersight sourcetype="cisco:intersight:alarms" | spath | stats count by Severity, Name, AffectedType | sort -Severity

tools.name: cisco_intersight_audit_log
tools.title: Intersight Audit Log
tools.description: Show recent audit records from Cisco Intersight (logins, changes, admin activity).
tools.spl: index=intersight sourcetype="cisco:intersight:auditrecords" | spath | stats count by Event, Email, SourceIp | sort -count

tools.name: cisco_intersight_server_inventory
tools.title: Intersight Server Inventory
tools.description: Show compute server inventory from Cisco Intersight (blades and rack units).
tools.spl: index=intersight sourcetype="cisco:intersight:compute" | spath | stats latest(OperState) as State, latest(Model) as Model, latest(Serial) as Serial, latest(NumCpus) as CPUs, latest(TotalMemory) as MemoryMB by Name | sort Name

tools.name: cisco_intersight_security_advisories
tools.title: Intersight Security Advisories
tools.description: Show security advisories (PSIRTs) affecting devices managed by Cisco Intersight.
tools.spl: index=intersight sourcetype="cisco:intersight:advisories" | spath | stats count by AdvisoryId, Severity, Name | sort -Severity

tools.name: cisco_intersight_contract_status
tools.title: Intersight Contract Status
tools.description: Show device contract and warranty status from Cisco Intersight.
tools.spl: index=intersight sourcetype="cisco:intersight:contracts" | spath | stats latest(ContractStatus) as Status, latest(ServiceEndDate) as EndDate by DeviceId, PlatformType | sort EndDate

tools.name: cisco_intersight_metrics_summary
tools.title: Intersight Metrics Summary
tools.description: Show a summary of performance metrics (CPU, memory, temperature) from Cisco Intersight.
tools.spl: index=intersight sourcetype="cisco:intersight:metrics" | stats count by source | sort -count
examples: What performance data is being collected?
